items.content_html: Random Tables plugin for Obsidian. Designed for tabletop RPGs and other creative uses. Use tables, lists, or paragraphs with embedded randomization alternatives. Supports custom weights, or defaults such as first results being most common, as well as nested generators. Re-roll results or parts of them, and save them for later.
items.title: fractalpixel/random-tables: Random Tables plugin for Obsidian.  Designed for tabletop RPGs and other creative uses.  Use tables, lists, or paragraphs with embedded randomization alternatives.  Supports custom weights, or defaults such as first results being most common, as well as nested generators.  Re-roll results or parts of them, and save them for later.
